subtitle: Chief Technology Officer -- Platform Architecture | Cybersecurity & Compliance | AI Strategy
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years as first CTO at a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit and 17 years as founder of a web/IT consulting firm. Built platform organizations from the ground up, executed enterprise transformations with zero service disruption, and sustained continuous PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and CARD Act compliance under audit by all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB. Owned the data function end-to-end through DataRobot production ML deployment for credit and servicing decisions; led enterprise contact center AI transformation including intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching, and integrated knowledge systems. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a structured evaluation methodology adopted by a national CX consulting firm. Security-first operating posture and discretion-grade trust posture that high-trust client relationships demand.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance, integration-fit, and capability dimensions.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and reflexive AI governance practice on LinkedIn.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Appointed as the first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across data, infrastructure, software engineering, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance; institutionalized security-first operating posture with very low audit finding frequency.
Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent call routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.
Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure across the data and platform stack.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin through enterprise data warehouse maturation through production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions under regulatory governance.

Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization; multi-factor prioritization model governed sprint-over-sprint decisions.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, Endpoint & Network Security, Identity, GRC Programs
Cloud Migration, Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Multi-Site Operations, Vendor Architecture
DataRobot (Production ML), Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, Power BI, Tableau
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Roadmap, Build-Buy-Partner
Team Building (35+ direct / 75+ extended), Digital Transformation, Executive Stakeholder Alignment, Zero-Disruption Go-Lives
